name: Wheat Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine whole-wheat flour and unbleached all-purpose flour.
2. Add dry milk, salt, wheat germ, sugar, and baking powder to the flour mixture.
3. Mix well until evenly distributed.
4. Cut in shortening using a pastry blender until it is evenly distributed throughout the mixture.
5. Transfer the mixture to a large airtight container.
6. Label the container as "WHEAT MIX" and store it in a cool, dry place.
7. Use within 10 to 12 weeks.
